items.title: Tabular supervised learning pipelines
items.description: Before training logistic regression or neural nets on mixed numeric tables, teams impute or drop incomplete rows so every feature column is finite at fit time.

items.title: Healthcare and clinical records
items.description: Lab results and vitals are often sporadically ordered; MAR-style imputation within patient cohorts plus missingness flags supports risk models without discarding entire encounters.

items.title: Recommendation and click logs
items.description: Sparse user–item interaction matrices treat unobserved clicks as missing rather than zero preference; matrix factorization and embeddings learn from partial observations.

items.title: Time-series operations dashboards
items.description: Forward-fill and limited interpolation smooth brief sensor dropouts so alerting rules see continuous series without deleting whole minutes of telemetry.
